description: Perform a replication power analysis in JASP using the dataset '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/InvisibilityCloak.csv'. Determine the observed Cohen's d from an Independent Samples T-Test (Mischief by Cloak). Calculate the total sample size required for a two-sided replication with a power of 0.90 and an alpha of 0.05 based on the observed effect size. Save the JASP project to '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/PowerAnalysis.jasp' and record both the observed Cohen's d and the calculated Total Sample Size in '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/power_report.txt'.
